name: Debate Verdict Rubric
description: Evaluates whether debate_review reached a valid consensus

criteria.name: consensus_reached
criteria.check: final_decision is consensus_pass or consensus_fail (not no_consensus)

criteria.name: rounds_completed
criteria.check: At least 1 round has proponent and opponent arguments

criteria.name: arguments_present
criteria.check: Proponent and opponent arguments are non-empty for all rounds
